title: NickMod
description: This mod changes your username when you communicate in chat(CLIENT SIDE ONLY)
body:
This mod changes your username when you communicate in chat(CLIENT SIDE ONLY)

This mod is perfect for:
- Youtube Videos where you need a custom name
- Hiding your name from people when you send someone an image
- Streamers that dont want to get stream sniped as easily
- If you prefer having your username something else when you look at chat

**Usage:** ~nick [Custom Nickname]

**Q&A:**

**Why did you make this mod?**
  I made this mod because I couldn't find any nickname changers avaliable for forge 1.12.2

**Why is the command ~nick and not /nick?**
  I used the ~ because I did not want to interfere with any other nickname related mods(especially on servers)

**Can other people see my custom username?**
  No, this is a client side mod, so only **you** will see the custom username in chat
